name: @aukora/console
description: Read-only operator console for the Aukora governed organism. A curated, public-facing view of authority/lock state, growing receipt-chained memory, proposal governance, the advisory Fu council, provider truth-labels, budget hard-stops, and governed forgetting. Renders a deterministic DEMO_FIXTURE derived from the real organism; it signs, applies, deploys, and arms nothing.
author: Aumara
